name: project_docs_init
description: Initializes the 5 standardized documentation files (ProjectOverview.md, Settings.md, TaskingLog.md, AInotes.md, ErrorLog.md) at the root of a task directory. Run this at the start of any new task or when onboarding to an existing task directory that lacks these files.

project_dir.description: Absolute path to the task directory root.

session_id.description: Session ID for log_manager integration. Auto-injected by the engine.
